overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy exploring the Hufflepuff common room. The player character moves through a cozy dormitory bedroom with wooden furniture, transitions through a stone barrel-vaulted corridor with a distinctive round door, and enters a large circular underground common room featuring a grand fireplace, comfortable sofas, and students relaxing in warm ambient lighting.

events.description: approaches writing desk and looks down at scattered papers and inkwell

agents.ego_description: walking around the bedroom examining the beds, furniture, and desk items

curved stone wall with wooden support beams and arched ceiling
tall standing lamp with warm glowing light and green glass shade
writing desk with papers, books, and an hourglass
tall wooden cabinet with carved details

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cozy dormitory bedroom with warm lighting from brass floor lamps. The camera explores the space, moving past wooden four-poster beds and approaching a writing desk cluttered with papers and books. The room features stone walls with wooden arch supports and a carpeted floor.

medieval-style wall-mounted lantern with warm light
large circular wooden door with intricate stained glass panels depicting plants
simple wooden bench against the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow barrel-vaulted stone corridor with ribbed wooden ceilings. Wall lanterns provide warm lighting along the path. A student sits on a bench to the left as the camera approaches an impressive round door with stained glass panels at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular underground common room with seating areas

events.description: passing through the round doorway into the large open common room space
turning slightly to navigate around central seating area

agents.ego_description: entering the common room and walking through the central area past other students

student sitting on orange sofa reading a book

entered.detail: large round underground chamber with high ceilings and multiple archways
upholstered sofa with striped pattern near the entrance
decorative floor lamp with stained glass shade emitting warm light
large potted plant with thin trunk and leafy canopy
large round rug with intricate geometric patterns covering the stone floor
large stone fireplace with fire burning visible across the room
plush orange sofa with students seated nearby
tall wooden grandfather clock with pendulum visible
built-in stone bookshelves filled with books along the curved walls

segments.scene_description: Passing through the round doorway, the scene opens into a spacious circular common room with a high vaulted ceiling. The warm space features comfortable sofas, Tiffany-style lamps, and abundant potted plants. Students in dark robes sit on furniture or walk across the patterned rugs. A large fireplace burns in the distance, and bookshelves line the curved stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room fireplace area with seating nooks

events.description: approaching the grand fireplace and slowing to examine the details
camera pans up to focus on portrait above fireplace, catching the warm fire glow

agents.ego_description: approaching the grand fireplace and looking up at the portrait and carvings

notable_agents.action: group of students sitting near the fireplace engaged in conversation

entered.detail: elaborately carved stone fireplace with burning fire and iron grate
oval framed portrait of a woman in historical dress above the mantel
intricately carved stone mantel with decorative columns and floral patterns
bright flames burning in the fireplace with kettle hanging over
potted plants suspended from ceiling hooks trailing vines

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the grand stone fireplace at the heart of the common room, revealing intricate carvings on the mantelpiece and a warm fire burning within. Students sit in groups nearby, conversing. The camera pans upward to examine an oval portrait hanging above the fireplace, framed by decorative stonework and hanging plants.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the intimacy of a private dormitory into the expansive warmth of a bustling student common room. It begins by exploring a cozy bedroom filled with wooden four-poster beds and a cluttered writing desk under the glow of brass lamps. As the camera leaves the room, the space narrows into a barrel-vaulted stone corridor lit by wall lanterns, passing a seated student before approaching a large round door with stained glass panels. The scene then opens wide as the camera passes through the doorway into a spacious circular common room characterized by high vaulted ceilings, potted plants, and students relaxing on comfortable sofas. Finally, the movement draws closer to a grand stone fireplace with intricate carvings, panning upward to reveal an oval portrait framed by decorative stonework and hanging greenery.
